{{Infobox technique
| name = Arelius bloodline senses
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Arelius bloodline]] senses are a specialized hereditary ability belonging to members of [[House Arelius]]. Unlike standard spiritual perception, this gift functions as a web of awareness that allows the user to perceive their surroundings through strands of [[madra]]. This sensory method provides a heightened, deeper level of perception that can be used to see everything at once, effectively acting as an expansive detection network. This capability is particularly advantageous in environments where physical sight and hearing are obstructed, such as combat arenas with pillars or thick mist. While some users may possess these senses naturally, others can develop similar perceptive abilities through rigorous training or by inheriting the instincts of powerful masters.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Arelius bloodline senses]] are useful for navigating the pillar-filled [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Arelius bloodline]] possesses a famous ability.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]]'s bloodline senses are dull.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Arelius bloodline]] ability is different from the vision granted by [[Cladia]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Arelius bloodline senses]] allow for clear perception of physical micro-changes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
